case_title: MOORE, JOHNNIE VS LEE, HOBERT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOORE, JOHNNIE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HOBERT AMIN, KANTI DBA ARTMAR HOTEL LLC, SAN FRANCISCO,CA AMIN,URMILA DBA ARTMAR HOTEL LLC, SAN FRANCISCO,CA AMIN, AKSHAY - ARTMAR HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMIN, KANTI DBA ARTMAR HOTEL LLC, SAN FRANCISCO,CA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,877.44 AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HOBERT AMIN, AKSHAY - ARTMAR HOTEL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-16-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-11-2005, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HOBERT AMIN, AKSHAY - ARTMAR HOTEL
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO HOBERT LEE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $158.60 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HOBERT
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMIN,URMILA DBA ARTMAR HOTEL LLC, SAN FRANCISCO,CA
2ND POS FILED AS TO: LEE, HOBERT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, JOHNNIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, HOBERT AMIN, AKSHAY - ARTMAR HOTEL $1,632.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,632.75, DEFT LEE, HOBERT FAILED TO APPEAR. CASE DISMISSED AGAINST DEFTS AMIN, KANTI; AMIN, URMILA. DEFTS HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
